queries.question: How long is Macbeth?
queries.sql: SELECT total_length FROM Total_Length JOIN Theater_Plays ON Theater_Plays.theater_play_id =  Total_Length.theater_play_id WHERE play_title = 'Macbeth';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?total_length2 WHERE {
  ?total_length a :Total_Length .
  ?theater_plays a :Theater_Play .
  ?total_length p:hasTheater_Plays ?theater_plays .
  ?total_length p:total_length ?total_length2 .
  ?theater_plays p:play_title ?play_title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?play_title_f) = "Macbeth")
}

queries.question: How long is Macbeth?
queries.sql: SELECT Number_Of_Acts FROM Number_Of_Acts JOIN Theater_Plays ON Theater_Plays.theater_play_id =  Number_Of_Acts.theater_play_id WHERE play_title = 'Macbeth';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?number_of_acts2 WHERE {
  ?number_of_acts a :Number_Of_Acts .
  ?theater_plays a :Theater_Play .
  ?number_of_acts p:hasTheater_Plays ?theater_plays .
  ?number_of_acts p:number_of_acts ?number_of_acts2 .
  ?theater_plays p:play_title ?play_title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?play_title_f) = "Macbeth")
}

queries.question: How long is Macbeth?
queries.sql: SELECT total_length, Number_Of_Acts FROM Total_Length JOIN Theater_Plays ON Theater_Plays.theater_play_id =  Total_Length.theater_play_id  JOIN Number_Of_Acts ON Theater_Plays.theater_play_id =  Number_Of_Acts.theater_play_id WHERE play_title = 'Macbeth';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?total_length2 ?number_of_acts2 WHERE {
  ?total_length a :Total_Length .
  ?theater_plays a :Theater_Play .
  ?total_length p:hasTheater_Plays ?theater_plays .
  ?number_of_acts a :Number_Of_Acts .
  ?number_of_acts p:hasTheater_Plays ?theater_plays .
  ?total_length p:total_length ?total_length2 .
  ?number_of_acts p:number_of_acts ?number_of_acts2 .
  ?theater_plays p:play_title ?play_title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?play_title_f) = "Macbeth")
}

queries.question: Show me the longest duration of a play.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (MAX(?total_length_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?total_length a :Total_Length .
  ?total_length p:total_length ?total_length_a .
}

queries.question: Show me the longest duration of a play.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (MAX(?number_of_acts_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?number_of_acts a :Number_Of_Acts .
  ?number_of_acts p:number_of_acts ?number_of_acts_a .
}

queries.question: Show me the longest duration of a play.
queries.sql: SELECT MAX(total_length), MAX(Number_Of_Acts) FROM Total_Length JOIN Theater_Plays ON Theater_Plays.theater_play_id =  Total_Length.theater_play_id JOIN Number_Of_Acts ON Theater_Plays.theater_play_id =  Number_Of_Acts.theater_play_id;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (MAX(?total_length_a) AS ?agg) (MAX(?number_of_acts_a) AS ?agg2) WHERE {
  ?total_length a :Total_Length .
  ?theater_plays a :Theater_Play .
  ?total_length p:hasTheater_Plays ?theater_plays .
  ?number_of_acts a :Number_Of_Acts .
  ?number_of_acts p:hasTheater_Plays ?theater_plays .
  ?total_length p:total_length ?total_length_a .
  ?number_of_acts p:number_of_acts ?number_of_acts_a .
}
